name: example-materialized-chain
goal: Demonstrate a sequential implementation chain that opts into reviewed dependency materialization.

sharedContext.summary: Use this file as a template for a chained local Claude workflow where a downstream implementer continues from reviewed upstream workspace state instead of only a prompt summary.
constraints: Keep work bounded to orchestrator docs and local scripts.
Do not edit TODO.md, ai/state files, ai/log files, or ai/indexes.

tasks.title: Draft dependency-materialization docs
tasks.prompt: Read the orchestrator docs and script. Draft a bounded documentation update that explains when dependencyMaterialization="apply-reviewed" is appropriate and what operators should inspect before promotion.

tasks.title: Refine docs from reviewed upstream state
tasks.prompt: Continue the same documentation update from the reviewed upstream workspace state. Tighten wording, remove duplication, and keep the materialization contract internally consistent.

tasks.title: Review the chained doc update
tasks.prompt: Review the dependency output. Call out any missing safety rule, inspectability hole, or promotion risk in the chained materialization flow and propose one concrete follow-up.
